subcodes.first_line: I shall render thanks unto my Lord for guiding them that yearn unto the Paradise of reunion and calling them that are attracted unto the sacred precincts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لاشکرنک ربی علی ما هدیت المشتاقین الی جنه اللقاء و دعوت المنجذبین الی مشهد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @living waters; water of life, @service to others; to the Cause of God
